arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot aims thinly veiled dig at Man Utd after Tottenham humbling
arts.sum: Arne Slot has enjoyed a dream start to life at Liverpool after replacing Jurgen Klopp and the Dutchman already appears to be on board with the rivalry with Manchester United

arts.ttl: Archie Gray joins Foundation’s physical activity sessions for people with cancer
arts.sum: Archie Gray today visited Tottenham Hotspur Foundation’s Move4You programme - helping local people with cancer through a physical activity session. The summer arrival from Leeds United joined in with light circuit-based exercises at Tottenham Community Sports Centre, across the road from the Stadium.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes has red card during Man United loss to Tottenham overturned
arts.sum: United appealed against the decision and the Football Association has upheld a claim of wrongful dismissal.

arts.ttl: 'Amazing talent': Gabriel Agbonlahor says £40m Tottenham man has been outstanding all season
